subject: WS2.1 scaffold focused gates green; root knip still blocked by P4 symbols
body: WS2.1 progress: scaffold is implemented under packages/libs/graph-ingest with six reserved sub-path exports, root workspace registration, knip entry, depcruise no-orphans exceptions, and lockfile refresh. Focused validation is green: pnpm --filter @oaknational/graph-ingest type-check, lint, test (no tests, --passWithNoTests), and build all pass. Root depcruise is green. Root pnpm knip is still red on the same agent-tools P4 unused exports: sameAgentRoutingKey, ActiveClaimSummary, ActiveCommitQueueSummary, ClosedClaimSummary. I will not touch agent-tools. I am continuing unstaged and will hold git:index/head/staging until your GO after Lofty lands and the knip path is clear.
